importantConcepts.definition: A meta-protocol for immutable data storage on the Bitcoin blockchain.
Architecture supporting both direct Bitcoin and Counterparty-based transactions, with only Counterparty SRC-20 tokens discontinued after block 796000.

importantConcepts.concept: Transaction Filter and Rust Parser Relationship
importantConcepts.definition: The Python Transaction Filter orchestrates the process, using the Rust parser for efficient transaction filtering.
The sequence from block acquisition through transaction filtering, protocol validation, to database storage.

keyDocumentation.description: Guide for AI assistants with common commands and references
